_meta.title: FX Transaction Decision Tree
_meta.author: wave-2d-N2D.7-sonnet
_meta.scope: Czech GAAP (Act 563/1991 Sb. + Decree 500/2002 Sb. + ČÚS 006) for PO + OSVČ under 1B CZK
notes: AI must inject CURRENT ČNB rate for the transaction date (not entity's pevný kurz for DPH).
AI must NOT declare organization_id, user_id, workspace_id, or role as input.
Pending advisor review: related-party loan FX loss thin-cap interaction (Q-20260524-FX08).
Pending advisor review: záloha year-end treatment (Q-20260524-FX07).

method_choice.description: Entity-level accounting policy for FX conversion method

denni_kurz.label: Denní kurz (daily ČNB rate)
denni_kurz.rate_source: ČNB official rate on transaction date
denni_kurz.fallback_for_weekend_holiday: ČNB rate from last preceding business day

pevny_kurz.label: Pevný kurz (entity-set fixed rate)
pevny_kurz.rate_source: ČNB rate at start of sub-period (typically first business day of month)

method_choice.disclosure_required: Notes to financial statements (příloha k účetní závěrce)

transaction_types.label: Foreign-currency receivable — initial recognition
transaction_types.trigger: Invoice issued with amount in foreign currency; entity is seller

outputs.rate_used: cnb_rate_on_date (or entity's pevný kurz if that method chosen)
outputs.dph_base: Use ČNB rate on DUZP (NOT pevný kurz) — see FX-DPH-BASE

transaction_types.label: Foreign-currency receivable — settlement (payment received)
transaction_types.trigger: Customer pays in foreign currency; entity receives funds in FX bank account

computation.fx_direction: positive → kurzový zisk (663); negative → kurzová ztráta (563)

transaction_types.tax_deductibility: Daňově uznatelná (§ 24 odst. 2 písm. h) ZDP)

transaction_types.label: Foreign-currency payable — initial recognition
transaction_types.trigger: Invoice received with amount in foreign currency; entity is buyer

transaction_types.label: Foreign-currency payable — settlement (payment made)
transaction_types.trigger: Entity pays foreign-currency invoice from FX bank account

computation.fx_direction: positive (paid less than booked) → gain (663); negative (paid more) → loss (563)

posting_gain.label: Rate fell (gain — paid less CZK than booked)

posting_loss.label: Rate rose (loss — paid more CZK than booked)

transaction_types.tax_deductibility: Daňově uznatelná (§ 24 odst. 2 písm. h) ZDP)

transaction_types.label: Year-end re-translation (závěrkový přepočet)
transaction_types.trigger: Balance-sheet date (typically 31 December); monetary FX items outstanding
transaction_types.tax_timing: Same accounting period as the balance-sheet date

transaction_types.label: DHM acquired in foreign currency
transaction_types.trigger: Entity purchases tangible fixed asset; price denominated in foreign currency

fx_on_payment.note: Payment at different rate than delivery → FX difference goes to 563/663, NOT to DHM cost

transaction_types.label: Advance (záloha) paid in foreign currency
transaction_types.trigger: Entity pays advance to foreign supplier in foreign currency before delivery
transaction_types.note: Záloha is non-monetary — carries at original CZK book value until cleared

transaction_types.label: DPH base computation for foreign-currency transaction
transaction_types.trigger: Czech plátce DPH issues or receives invoice in foreign currency

outputs.note: Always use ČNB rate on DUZP — entity's pevný kurz does NOT apply for DPH

transaction_types.alternative_rate: ČNB rate from last business day preceding DUZP (§ 4 odst. 5 ZDPH)
invoice_requirements: ČNB rate used (or reference to § 4 odst. 5 ZDPH)

advisor_escalation_triggers: Related-party foreign-currency loan with outstanding balance > CZK 5M
FX forward or option contract present
FX loss on related-party loan where thin-cap ratio already exceeded on interest
Entity reporting under IFRS (different rules apply)
